pages.text: The coffee maker is used in $(thing)advanced brewing$() to create various kinds of coffee. Using up to three $(item)Coffee Essence$() or $(item)Coffee Extract$() and some extra items, you can create coffee. It can also grind $(item)roasted coffee beans$(). More on this in the chapter about $(l:brewery:advanced/coffee)coffee$(). It works similarly to the $(l:brewery:advanced/cocktail_station)cocktail station$(). You will know when something is happening because of the small red lamp glowing up.
The coffee maker is crafted using three iron blocks, four gold, a glass block and a roasted coffee bean.
